join_messages: Hey {player}, good to see you again in {biome}.
Hi {player}, welcome back. {machine} is probably waiting for you.
Hey {player}, good to see you again. Enjoy {biome}.
wholesome: Hi {player}, hope {biome} is treating you decently today.
Hey {player}, keep going. Even {activity} still counts as progress.
Hi {player}, the world feels a little better with you in {dimension}.
{player}, even messy progress is still progress.
shower_thoughts: {player}, if torches burn forever, what exactly are we feeding them?
Hey {player}, if skeletons use bows, who taught them archery?
Hi {player}, are mineshafts abandoned or just permanently understaffed?
{player}, if villagers gossip all day, are they technically a wireless network?
Hey {player}, what if cobblestone is just emotionally damaged stone?
{player}, if {machine} can exist in {biome}, maybe the laws of nature already gave up.
Hey {player}, is {activity} still a hobby once it requires this much infrastructure?
chaotic: {player}, the server is definitely not judging your storage system.
Hey {player}, your current plan seems questionable, which is promising.
Hi {player}, this feels like one of those decisions you'll explain later.
{player}, if it explodes, call it a redesign.
Hi {player}, you appear to be {activity} near {machine}. Bold.

creepy: Hey {player}, the world has been aware of your presence for some time.
{player}, the silence out here feels very observant today.
Hey {player}, you ever get the feeling the cave is listening back?
gtnh_wholesome: Hi {player}, every expert once started with a flint tool and confusion.
Hey {player}, GTNH progress is still progress, even when it takes three machines too many.
{player}, one machine at a time. One meltdown at a time.

Hey {player}, may your machines run and your cables remain unmelted.
gtnh_shower_thoughts: {player}, if progress requires ten machines to make one machine, is that advancement or ritual?
Hey {player}, at what point does ore processing become a religion?
Hi {player}, if every ingot takes five steps, are we refining metal or ourselves?
{player}, if you automate suffering, does it still count as suffering?
Hey {player}, are cables technology or just expensive trust exercises?
{player}, if {machine} needs five subcomponents, is it still a machine or a cry for help?

Hey {player}, one more machine will absolutely solve the machine problem.
{player}, your setup looks unsafe in a very authentic GTNH way.
